name: Violet Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fine, fresh whole wheat bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the heavy cream until stiff.
2. Gently fold in the bread crumbs and crystallized raw sugar.
3. Chill the mixture in the freezer until it is firm but not completely hard.
4. Before serving, mix a few crystallized violets into the ice cream.
5. Garnish each serving with additional crystallized violets.
